review_title: The reference app for conversational design
description: Overall experience excellent: we are dealing with a product that does many things and does them well. After an initial start a bit quiet and with few integrations, ManyChat has been able to conquer and establish itself in the market for advanced features, such as integrations and templates. This is the platform that I recommend to anyone who is starting from scratch.
author: Luciano Z.
pros: The product is very easy to use: despite its high potential and the many things it allows you to do, the menus and features are always organized in an orderly and logical way. Good responsiveness and stability
cons: I feel the lack of being able to make chatbots for the web channel: at the moment you can only create bots for Messenger, Email, SMS, Telegram, WhatsApp, and Instagram. In the free plan you can't do almost anything.

review_title: The revolutionary ChatBot ever developed
description: I have typically been pleased with the ManyChat platform as a user. ManyChat has helped me overcome a variety of company obstacles, such as automating lead creation, marketing, and customer service. I value the advantages I've experienced, including increased effectiveness in managing repetitive activities, improved user engagement through tailored interactions, and the capacity to communicate with a larger audience via various channels. In order to better improve my experience, I have also mentioned platform policy difficulties and wanted extra functionality. Overall, ManyChat has shown to be an effective tool for boosting client interaction and optimizing my business procedures.
author: Mugume R.
pros: Its automation features, multi-channel support, and lead generation tools. I found the software to be rather user-friendly, particularly when setting up automatic messaging sequences and chatbots. Integrating with already-existing business processes can take several forms depending on the workflow's complexity and the particular tools and systems being used. It also provides integration possibilities with various outside technologies, making it simpler for organizations to integrate it with their current tech stack.
cons: Requests for more functionality on the free plan, a learning curve for sophisticated automation, sporadic problems integrating based on current infrastructure, worries about shifting platform rules, and more. Although I found the platform to be user-friendly for creating chatbots, integrating it with some particular business processes proved to be somewhat challenging.

review_title: It's great if you have a large, active, and engaged following
description: Overall, it was positive, and honestly, I may become a customer again one day.
author: Joy H.
pros: Keywords, Referral Links, Sequences. I loved that I could use it for both Facebook and Instagram. The automation allowed me to connect with customers without having to be tied to my phone responding to messages.
cons: During the pandemic, I used the program a lot, but it was becoming cost prohibitive. Manychat charges based on the number of subscribers you have, even if you never message them. Which is problematic when you take into account spam and bots. I was paying for people I wasn't even talking to.

review_title: Great messenger chatbot and SMS marketing tool!
description: ManyChat is a comprehensive chatbot that will meet most professional marketers' needs. The free version would be sufficient in most small business applications. Highly recommend the automation and messenger campaign marketing tools.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Capture leads directly from Facebook / Instagram messenger using live chat support icons embedded on your web pages or directly from your social media channels. Automated response workflows make it easy to setup a customer journey, provide FAQs more organically, and capture emails or phone numbers for future marketing.
cons: ManyChat has some decent API options via Zapier which allows access to most tools and native integrations with CRMs like Hubspot and Salesforce. However, this is only contact data and not behaviors. A more comprehensive integration on the CRM contact record that links to ManyChat's SMS and chat activity would be very useful for sales lead scoring and customer service.

review_title: An Exotic Online Chatbot
description: Overall Experience with ManyChat was phenomenal, i would definitely advise you to give it a try.
author: Montrez W.
pros: I like how ManyChat supports integration with popular messaging apps like Facebook Messenger and Instagram. With a lot of companies you would not be able to do as much with Facebook Messenger and Instagram but ManyChat lets you.
cons: Only thing I didn’t like about ManyChat is its support system. It seemed like you were almost not able to reach them. But overall, a great user base that helps out on other social media platforms.

review_title: We Automated our Customer Support
description: I really love the platform as I learned and made more than 200 highly conversational chatbots by myself in different Occasions. Having made and used these many chatbots, I found no issues with its execution neither any customer complaints. We are still using Manychat in our company to address new and existing clients with new launches and Broadcasting Offers.
author: Gaurav J.
pros: I really liked the ability of personalizing our messages when addressing clients since the names are auto populated from different social media platforms. Thus it takes less number of replies from the customer to get to conversion.
cons: JSON was a little issue when we started initially but now work is smooth.

review_title: ManyChat: An Easy and Affordable Chatbot Solution with Limitations
description: The ManyChat experience can vary depending on the user's expectations and particular use case. However, the program is generally regarded as being user-friendly and simple to set up. Without coding knowledge, users may easily develop and manage chatbot conversations using the drag-and-drop interface.In conclusion, ManyChat can be an excellent solution for companies looking for a simple and economical approach to automate client interactions on chat platforms. However, it might not be the ideal choice for companies who require more sophisticated customization and analytics features.
author: Phil J.
pros: The user-friendly interface of ManyChat makes it simple to start up and maintain chatbots.Customer interactions can be automated with the help of ManyChat, including the provision of product information or the resolution of frequently requested questions.Affordable: ManyChat provides both a free plan and reasonably priced subscription plans.
cons: Limited customization options: ManyChat's chatbot interactions aren't very customizable and might not be able to handle more complicated requests.Limited analytics: The analytics provided by ManyChat are basic and may not be sufficient for businesses that need more detailed data.

review_title: An easy to use platform
author: Adrian U.
pros: It is stable and easy to manage.Lots of documentation on the internet. Easy to learn.
cons: A rather high price compared to other platformsIt doesn't have many AI options

review_title: The best FB Messenger ChatBot Platform
description: The builder UI changed frequently, and kept making it harder to access features I was relying on. Additionally, FB tightened a lot of the requirements making it harder to reach leads
author: Dave N.
pros: I like being able to quickly duplicate my existing template chatbot over to set up new clients quickly
cons: The pricing is too high, and integrating with other tools required lots of patchwork zapier solutions

review_title: The OG of all Chatbots
description: Been a user for many years and their product has continuously improved and become more stable over time.
author: Ivan N.
pros: ManyChat is the premium solution for all chatbot messaging and automation. It's rich in features and is by far the most well-rounded solution for serious marketers. Their UI is on point and building bot flows is enjoyable and highly customizable.
cons: Their inbox can use some work on the UI/UX side but we don't really use them for that.

review_title: Buenísima experiencia
author: Christian S.
pros: Me gustó todas las opciones que tiene para poder configurar y dar múltiples opciones a tu cliente para que se torne una conversación bien fluida
cons: Cuando empiezas a conocer una herramienta tiende a ser un poco tedioso el conocerla desde cero, pero cuando la empiezas a usar todos los días ya te familiarizas
author_profession: Técnico en administración de redes computacionales

review_title: Manychat is the best
description: Since I discovered it in 2020, I realised many flows and earn a lot of money
author: Tchikwa A.
pros: Very accessible, the free options can offer Manus choices, and it's very reliable for beginners
cons: The manychat don't have french version. Not easy for french speaking users

review_title: Manychat, le meilleur
description: Malgré ses quelques dysfonctionnements, Manychat est un excellent plateforme de création de chatbots. Surtout que son service client est réactif et très utile.
author: Habib G.
pros: ManyChat est un outil formidable qui permet à ses utilisateurs d'automatiser la communication avec les clients. Il permet surtout de créer des chatbots conviviaux grâce à sa grande variété de fonctionnalités.
cons: Ce que je reproche à Manychat est principalement son coût. De même, la plateforme est parfois instable, ce qui empêche de travailler en tout temps.

review_title: What you really need for your Facebook pages and more
description: I like to use it a lot for my customer support in Facebook page, but also to make myself known and create a good gamification opportunity that is very useful for attracting leads and offering discount codes. Its integration with artificial intelligence then makes everything amazing
author: Ettore L.
pros: I have been using Manychat for several years and I must admit that it is the market leader for the chatbot sector, I find it a very useful tool for creating interesting workflows, perfect for lead generation and for creating fantastic funnels. I like to connect with activecampaign and similar tools
cons: I didn't find any particular problems and I can't complain, for those who do digital marketing it is an important ally, maybe it would be nice in the future to have greater discounts on subscription costs.

review_title: Unable to actually message contacts
author: Shalm H.
pros: Fantastic UI and easy to understand features. If only they all worked.
cons: We pay for 10,000 contacts each month ($65 USD / mth) yet we are unable to contact them. We have a full understanding of tags and requirements to contact them, however, support is unwilling to assist. When ManyChat uploads the 5,000+ contacts to Facebook Ads, Facebook is unable to match the data uploaded to even 2,000 contacts. When I contact Facebook Support, they tell me to talk to ManyChat. When I talk to ManyChat, they tell me to talk to Facebook. Very poor support and very poor functionality. They offer no access to the data they are uploading, so we are unable to check if there are any errors occurring and support is unwilling to assist. "Unfortunately, I can't provide that info to you, as we don't have enough insight into the Facebook Ads Manager processes. Please, make sure to address it to Facebook support." They should remove the services from their website, but that would defeat the purpose of building a messenger list and therefore make their pricing irrelevant. We will likely have to involve legal services, however, the legal costs will outweigh the subscription fees. Unfortunately for some companies like this is seems the only way.

review_title: A Phenomenal Omnichannel Chatbot Platform
author: aleah L.
pros: It was an very enjoyable app and i spent a lot of time
cons: I Don't understand half of it its a lil confusing

review_title: A must-have for the modern business owner
author: Yann I.
pros: There are a few things I like about ManyChat. Firstly, its Facebook Messenger bot. Their Drag, Drop and Connect approach is straightforward and will make you feel like a chatbot genius, because you'll be able to create Facebook Messenger chatbot in minutes by simply clicking, dragging and dropping! Then, there's the text messaging feature. While email is still a powerful asset for marketing and sales, relying on text messages can turn out to be a very wise strategic move. I like the fact that ManyChat can be used for different texting-related things, including sending promo and coupon codes or even have people leave you their phone number or a product review. And if this wasn't enough, ManyChat lets me integrate the platform with tools I use for other parts of my business, like email marketing tools, CRM tools and payment gateways (plus, there's a Zapier integration, which means that I can leverage ManyChat in combination of plenty of other platforms).
cons: As someone who isn't using Shopify, I would say that I wouldn't mind seeing what ManyChat does with Shopify with some other platform. In particular, I think that this could help with turning cart abandonments into opportunities to generate more sales
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My 24/7 Customer Service Assistant
author: Samuel I.
pros: Many things to like about ManyChat but I just want to talk about the chatbot feature as I used it as my personal customer service representative.Easy integration with the Facebook Messenger.
cons: Has some limitations.I do like to see an improvement

review_title: The platform doesn't work and they offer no support whatsoever.
description: The app simply won't work and they offer no support whatsoever, not even after subscribing to the paid version of the app. I tried 3 times to submit a ticket to the support page, unsuccessfully.
author: Guilherme S.
pros: I would have liked it if it had worked. The automated response to comments on posts would've been very helpful for my business.
cons: They offer no support whatsoever. You have no option to delete your account.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Focused on Facebook & a little expensive
description: We used Manychat for all our facebook pages to sell items in a conversational style.
author: Marius T.
pros: Its really easy to set up and every step is guided - you cant get it wrong! If you need a hyper focused tool for facebook marketing, this is the go to solution.
cons: Its pricey and limited in functionality compared to other upcoming products.

review_title: A must have for conversational commerce
description: Overall my experience has been good, I just wish the unlimited contact plan remained free.
author: Connor C.
pros: I love the ability to build advanced flows to create conversational commerce experiences for my customers.
cons: Recently ManyChat has removed their unlimited contacts free plan, which is unfortunate.

review_title: Awesome for Facebook ads
author: Anamaria D.
pros: Setting up the flow is really easy and they provide all tutorials you need in order to do a great job.
cons: I can't think of anything that I didn't like about it. The only thing I would change would be the ownership of account to not be linkedin to Facebook but to email maybe in case anything happens to your Facebook to not lose ManyChat account.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great software but limited to FB policy
description: I created automations to handle customer support.
author: Eduardo C.
pros: Manychat is super easy to user. Anyone can implement complex messenger automations with drag and drop functionalities. You can get a fully automated system up and running in hours.
cons: Facebook Messenger policies are now very strict and that hurts Manychat because you can't message a user outside of the 24 hour period. This is now making list building in Messenger impossible.

review_title: It's worked great for our brand!!
description: Had a great experience with the app! It's exactly what we've been wanting!
author: Claire T.
pros: It's extremely affordable and super easy to use! It's great to set up and it allows for a great way to connect with our customers!
cons: Not really much to not like, it's a great software and I highly recommend it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Revolutionizing Customer Service with ManyChat Chatbots
description: Overall, ManyChat is generally well-regarded as a powerful and user-friendly platform. It has a large user base and a growing number of integrations and partnerships, which can help businesses and organizations get the most out of their investment. However, as with any tool or platform, there may be some potential drawbacks to consider, such as cost, limited functionality, and privacy concerns. Businesses and organizations should carefully weigh the pros and cons before deciding if ManyChat is the right fit for them.
author: Emil L.
pros: Some of the most impactful features include:1. Automated chatbot flows: You can build automated chatbot flows with ManyChat that can respond to client queries, provide tailored messages, and even manage purchases and payments. Your marketing and customer service operations can be streamlined as a result.2. Segmentation and targeting:With ManyChat, you can build specialized audiences based on a range of variables, including geography, activity, and interests, and then deliver those audiences specific messages. You are thus able to send out communications that are more pertinent and distinctive.3. Integrations: Numerous prominent tools and platforms, such as CRMs, e-commerce platforms, and email marketing software, are available for integration with ManyChat. Your customer service and marketing operations can be made more efficient as a result.4. Visual flow builder: Even if you have little to no coding knowledge, you can easily develop and maintain chatbot flows with ManyChat's visual flow builder.5. Analytics and reporting: The analytics and reporting tools in ManyChat let you monitor your chatbot's effectiveness and pinpoint its weak points.Overall, these features can help businesses and organizations of all sizes improve their customer communications and engagement, leading to increased customer loyalty and satisfaction.
cons: Businesses and organizations should think about these potential negatives before adopting ManyChat as they would with any product or platform. A few possible drawbacks of ManyChat include:1. Limited functionality: Even while ManyChat offers a wide variety of features and integrations, not all businesses or organizations will find that it is able to suit their demands. Some situations can be better suited to more specialized or sophisticated chatbot platforms.2. Dependence on Facebook: ManyChat is essentially a chat platform for Facebook Messenger, therefore in order to use it effectively, businesses and organizations will need to be well-known on Facebook. Some people might not find this possible or appealing.3. Privacy concerns: Chatbots may raise privacy concerns for certain users, especially if they are being utilized to process orders or payments. To allay these worries, companies and organizations using ManyChat should be open about their data collecting and usage practices.Overall, while ManyChat can be a powerful and useful tool for improving customer communication and engagement, it is important for businesses and organizations to carefully consider their needs and resources before deciding if it is the right fit for them.
